inputs.label: Previous Meter Reading (m³)
inputs.businessContext: The meter reading at the start of the billing period, in cubic meters.

businessContext_i18n.en: The meter reading at the start of the billing period, in cubic meters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Fatura dönemi başlangıcındaki sayaç okuması, metreküp cinsinden.

inputs.label: Current Meter Reading (m³)
inputs.businessContext: The meter reading at the end of the billing period, in cubic meters.

businessContext_i18n.en: The meter reading at the end of the billing period, in cubic meters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Fatura dönemi sonundaki sayaç okuması, metreküp cinsinden.

inputs.label: Fixed Charge
inputs.businessContext: Monthly fixed service charge regardless of consumption.

businessContext_i18n.en: Monthly fixed service charge regardless of consumption.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tüketimden bağımsız aylık sabit hizmet ücreti.

inputs.label: Rate per Cubic Meter
inputs.businessContext: Variable charge per cubic meter of water consumed.

businessContext_i18n.en: Variable charge per cubic meter of water consumed.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tüketilen her metreküp su için değişken ücret.

inputs.label: Tax Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Tax percentage applied to the subtotal (usage + fixed charge).

businessContext_i18n.en: Tax percentage applied to the subtotal (usage + fixed charge).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ara toplama (kullanım + sabit ücret) uygulanan vergi yüzdesi.
